chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَجِّ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/120)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/120)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَ حَجَّ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) غَيْرَ حَجَّةِ الْوَدَاعِ قَالَ نَعَمْ عِشْرِينَ حَجَّةً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Umar Bin Yazeed who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Did Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> perform a Hajj other than the Farewell Hajj?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, twenty Hajjs’ (in concealment as per the below Hadith).
en.sarwar: 11. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn abu Najran from al-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from ‘Umar ibn Yazid who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Did the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, perform any other Hajj besides the farewell Hajj ? 5 He replied, ‘Yes, he did so twenty times . ‘“
